---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for bookline
title: "feat: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What are you trying to do that bookline makes hard or impossible today?

## Proposed solution

What you would like to happen, and roughly where it would fit (booking page, dashboard, slot engine,
calendar interop, reminders, ...).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about, and why they fall short.

## Scope check

bookline is deliberately a single-host, email-only, no-payments app. Some things are explicit
non-goals in `docs/PRD.md` (payments, multi-host/teams, two-way calendar sync, visitor accounts,
SMS/push, recurring appointments, i18n). If your request touches one of those, say why it is worth
revisiting.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, or examples from other tools.
